Comment: Daily SEAO ELT pipeline: idempotency check → Lambda extract → Glue crawler (poll) → Athena transform → mark complete.

Init.Comment: Derive YYYY-MM-DD from the execution start time. $processDate is available in every downstream state.

ExtractSEAO.Comment: Invoke seao-extract Lambda. Writes one JSON file per contract to S3 raw/dt=YYYY-MM-DD/.

StartCrawler.Comment: Kick off the Glue crawler. If it's already running, jump straight to the polling loop.

CrawlerDone.Comment: Glue crawlers have no .sync integration; poll every 30s until State = READY.

RunTransform.Comment: Athena INSERT that flattens raw JSON → seao.contracts. .sync waits for the query to finish. The date is injected via JSONata string concat at WHERE dt = '...'.

Arguments.QueryString: {% "INSERT INTO seao.contracts SELECT CAST(NULL AS varchar), CAST(contract.avisResumeInformation.id AS varchar), contract.avisResumeInformation.typeAvis.descriptionFr, 'Publié', concat('https://seao.gouv.qc.ca/avis-resultat-recherche/consulter?ItemId=', uuid), contract.avisResumeInformation.titre, contract.avisResumeInformationDO.nomOrganisation, contract.avisResumeInformation.natureContrat.descriptionFr, contract.avisResumeCategorieUnspsc.categorie.descriptionFr, contract.avisResumeDescription.descriptionHtml, array_join(transform(contract.avisResumeCategorieUnspsc.unspsc, u -> u.descriptionFr), '; '), json_format(CAST(contract.avisResumeDocuments.documents AS json)), array_join(transform(contract.avisResumeInformation.regionsLivraison, r -> r.descriptionFr), '; '), array_join(transform(contract.avisResumeInformation.accordMarchesPublics, a -> a.descriptionFr), '; '), contract.avisResumeInformation.territoireVise.descriptionFr, contract.avisResumeInformation.datePublicationUtc, contract.avisResumeInformation.dateLimiteReceptionOffresUtc, contract.avisResumeInformation.dateLimiteReceptionPlaintesUtc, CAST(NULL AS varchar), contract.avisResumeInformation.dateLimiteReceptionOffresUtc, CAST(NULL AS varchar), contract.avisResumeInformation.dureePrevueSansOptions, contract.avisResumeInformation.dureePrevueIncluantOptions, contract.avisResumeInformation.sommaireOptionsRenouvellement, CAST(contract.avisResumeInformation.contratSurDemande AS varchar), CAST(contract.avisResumeInformation.contratSurDemande AS varchar), contract.avisResumeInformation.stveOption.descriptionFr, contract.avisResumeInformation.adresseRecuperation.descriptionLongueFr, contract.avisResumeInformation.adresseOuverture.descriptionLongueFr, CAST(contract.avisResumeInformation.prevoitAdjudicationParLot AS varchar), contract.avisResumeInformation.restrictionSupplementaire, array_join(transform(contract.avisResumeGarantieSoumission.naturesGaranties, g -> g.descriptionFr), '; '), contract.avisResumeGarantieSoumission.valeurGarantieHtml, contract.avisResumeDescription.nomFournisseur, CASE WHEN cardinality(contract.avisResumeInformationDO.contacts) > 0 THEN concat(coalesce(contract.avisResumeInformationDO.contacts[1].prenom, ''), ' ', coalesce(contract.avisResumeInformationDO.contacts[1].nom, '')) ELSE NULL END, CASE WHEN cardinality(contract.avisResumeInformationDO.contacts) > 0 THEN contract.avisResumeInformationDO.contacts[1].courriel ELSE NULL END, CASE WHEN cardinality(contract.avisResumeInformationDO.contacts) > 0 THEN contract.avisResumeInformationDO.contacts[1].telephone ELSE NULL END, dt FROM seao.raw src WHERE src.dt = '" & $processDate & "' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM seao.contracts c WHERE c.numero_reference = CAST(src.contract.avisResumeInformation.id AS varchar))" %}
